changes.description: AUTHORITY PATH MISMATCH — The 'Authoritative inputs' section lists docs/architecture/healthiq_day_one_architecture_rework_sprint_plan_FINAL_updated.md. This path DOES NOT EXIST in the repository. The actual file is at docs/sprints/healthiq_day_one_architecture_rework_sprint_plan_FINAL_updated.md (confirmed present). The prompt itself covers this: 'If the exact paths differ, locate the equivalent repo-persisted files and document the actual paths used.' Non-blocking.
changes.required_action: Cursor: use docs/sprints/healthiq_day_one_architecture_rework_sprint_plan_FINAL_updated.md as the sprint plan authority. Document the path correction in the Phase 10 audit paper.

changes.description: BATCH 2 ENDOCRINE SIGNALS HAVE NO ROOT-CAUSE REGISTRY ENTRIES — backend/core/knowledge/root_cause_registry_v1.py (lines 29-76) lists all registered root-cause targets. None of the activated Batch 2 endocrine signals are registered: signal_free_t3_low, signal_fai_high, signal_free_testosterone_high, signal_free_testosterone_low are ALL absent. Only thyroid-adjacent signals registered are signal_thyroid_tsh_context (line 33), signal_tsh_high (line 68), signal_tsh_low (line 69). This means Phase 3 will encounter these signals with NO governed root-cause path. Cursor must NOT invent root-cause output — must classify them as ROOT_CAUSE_REQUIRES_FUTURE_MAPPING and document the gap. This is a predictable, expected finding consistent with the sprint scope.
changes.required_action: Cursor: in Phase 3, classify signal_free_t3_low, signal_fai_high, signal_free_testosterone_high, signal_free_testosterone_low as ROOT_CAUSE_REQUIRES_FUTURE_MAPPING in root_cause_authority_register_v1.yaml. Do not create governed hypotheses for these signals in this sprint. Do not create root-cause output for them. This is the correct outcome — the register documenting the gap IS the sprint deliverable for these signals.

changes.description: NARRATIVE COMPILER RUNTIME YAML READS — backend/core/analytics/narrative_report_compiler_v1.py (lines 33-36) reads three YAML files at runtime: knowledge_bus/interpretation_entities_v1/benchmark_interpretation_entities_v1.yaml, knowledge_bus/pathway_explainers_v1/pathway_explainers_v1.yaml, knowledge_bus/functional_interpretation_v1/functional_interpretation_v1.yaml. These are governed compiled narrative assets, NOT raw Pass 3 / investigation spec files. Confirmed present: all three files exist in their respective directories. Phase 1 must classify these reads as GOVERNED_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY (not LEGACY_UNGOVERNED_BLOCKER). Cursor must NOT quarantine or disable these reads. Confirm classification in the output-authority estate map.
changes.required_action: Cursor: in Phase 1 output-authority estate map, classify all three knowledge_bus narrative YAML runtime reads as GOVERNED_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY. These files are governed compiled assets, not raw research files. Do not confuse them with investigation_spec or research_brief files. investigation_spec_to_promoted_signal.py (backend/core/knowledge/investigation_spec_to_promoted_signal.py) is a BUILD-TIME translation utility — it is only called from scripts/ and tests/, never at runtime. Confirm this in Phase 1.

changes.description: PROVENANCE METADATA PHASE 5 — DTO BREAK RISK — backend/core/layer3/insight_assembler_v1.py (line 1) uses InsightCard and Layer3InsightsV1 from backend/core/contracts/layer3_insights_v1.py. Phase 5 requires adding provenance fields to compiled outputs. Any schema addition to InsightCard or Layer3InsightsV1 may break frontend DTO consumers. STOP condition 4 applies: 'output authority cannot be represented without breaking frontend DTO consumers'. Cursor must verify frontend DTO tolerance (whether extra unknown fields are ignored) BEFORE implementing Phase 5 provenance additions. Pydantic models with extra='forbid' will reject extra fields entirely — if any consumer model uses extra='forbid', additive provenance is a breaking change.
changes.required_action: Cursor: before implementing Phase 5 provenance metadata additions, read backend/core/contracts/layer3_insights_v1.py and the frontend DTO contract (backend/core/dto/frontend_contract_v1.py). Check if any model uses extra='forbid'. If yes, STOP and report — do not add fields to those models. If extra fields are tolerated (extra='allow' or not set), proceed with additive provenance fields only. Never change existing field types or remove fields.

changes.description: INTELLIGENCE CORE COMPONENTS IN SCOPE — This sprint touches the following confirmed Intelligence Core components: backend/core/analytics/root_cause_compiler_v1.py (KB-S33, lines 1-13, confirmed deterministic hypothesis-based compiler), backend/core/analytics/report_compiler_v1.py (KB-S32, confirmed uses compile_root_cause_v1 and compiled hypothesis artefacts), backend/core/analytics/narrative_report_compiler_v1.py (N-8, confirmed consumes governed YAML assets), backend/core/layer3/insight_assembler_v1.py (Sprint 22, confirmed deterministic rule-based). HIGH risk classification is correct. Any code changes to these files require full behavioural audit in Phase 10. New governance YAML files in knowledge_bus/governance/ are CONTENT only and do not trigger Intelligence Core behavioural concerns unless they gate runtime compiler behaviour.
changes.required_action: Cursor: treat any modification to the four compiler/assembler files listed above as HIGH risk behaviour changes requiring explicit justification in the audit paper. New knowledge_bus/governance/*.yaml files created in Phases 2-4 are CONTENT — do not misclassify them as BEHAVIOUR unless they are consumed by a runtime loader.

stage_2b_behavioural_hardening.change_type_justified: Sprint may quarantine or disable legacy analytical output paths (changes what emitted output users see), add provenance metadata to compiled DTOs (changes output shape), and repair root-cause/card authority wiring (changes output content authority). All touch Intelligence Core components. BEHAVIOUR classification is mandatory and correct.

stop_conditions_protect_behavioural_corr.stop_5: Untraceable analytical output cannot be quarantined safely — STOP. Do not delete large legacy systems; quarantine behind inactive flag only.

determinism_risks_surfaced: RISK 1 (HIGH): Batch 2 endocrine signals (free_t3_low, fai_high, free_testosterone_high, free_testosterone_low) have NO entries in root_cause_registry_v1.py. Phase 3 will find no governed root-cause path for these signals. Cursor must NOT invent root-cause hypotheses. Must classify as ROOT_CAUSE_REQUIRES_FUTURE_MAPPING. Emitting fabricated root-cause output for these signals would be an analytical authority violation.

RISK 2 (HIGH): Phase 5 provenance metadata additions may break frontend DTO if any Pydantic model in the output chain uses extra='forbid'. layer3_insights_v1.py InsightCard model must be checked before any field additions. Cursor must verify DTO tolerance FIRST.

RISK 3 (MEDIUM): narrative_report_compiler_v1.py reads governed YAML assets at runtime. These must NOT be classified as ungoverned in Phase 1. Incorrect classification would cause Phase 6 to quarantine legitimate governed output paths.

RISK 4 (MEDIUM): Any quarantine of root-cause or card output in Phase 6 must be done behind an inactive flag — not by deleting code. Delete is forbidden unless clearly safe and test-covered per STOP condition 5.

RISK 5 (LOW): Phase 8 requires regression tests covering FT3 low activated/suppressed case, FAI high activated/suppressed case, free testosterone high/low activated/suppressed cases. These signals are now active (BATCH2-FULL-COVERAGE-ACTIVATION-1 is merged). Test coverage for their output authority traceability is the new work — existing activation tests do not cover output provenance.

hardening_notes: Sprint is correctly classified HIGH / BEHAVIOUR / TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. All 7 required authoritative audit papers confirmed present. One authority path discrepancy (sprint plan listed under docs/architecture/ but actually in docs/sprints/) is non-blocking per prompt self-correction guidance. All prerequisite sprints confirmed merged to main. All 4 required validator scripts exist. All 3 regression test files exist. Secret file guard exists. Three governance YAML files to be created are new (correct). Intelligence Core files confirmed deterministic with no raw Pass 3 runtime reads. Critical finding: Batch 2 endocrine signals (FT3 low, FAI high, free testosterone high/low) have no root-cause registry entries — Phase 3 must classify as ROOT_CAUSE_REQUIRES_FUTURE_MAPPING, not invent output. DTO break risk in Phase 5 requires frontend tolerance check before implementation. Narrative compiler runtime YAML reads are governed compiled assets — must not be misclassified as ungoverned in Phase 1. GPT architectural review and human approval required before merge per HIGH risk route. Five determinism risks surfaced in Stage 2B.
